---
title: "L4"
author: "matios"
format: html
editor: visual
date: "20.4.2026"
---

# quarto is cool!

```{r}
dotchart(mtcars$mpg, labels=row.names(mtcars), cex=.7,
         main="Gas Milage for Car Models",
         xlab="Miles Per Gallon")

```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
dotchart(mtcars$mpg, labels=row.names(mtcars), cex=.7,
         main="Gas Milage for Car Models",
         xlab="Miles Per Gallon")

```

```{r,eval=FALSE,include=FALSE}
dotchart(mtcars$mpg, labels=row.names(mtcars), cex=.7,
         main="Gas Milage for Car Models",
         xlab="Miles Per Gallon"
```

*matios* **tekletsadik** `336301908` [BGU](https://www.bgu.ac.il)

```{r,eval=FALSE}
```

| NUM1 | NUM2 |
|------|------|
| 4    | 6    |
| 5    | 9    |
| 2    | 1    |
